aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as structured schema markup and relevant content. However, it lacks depth in content, user engagement features, and local SEO optimization.
quick_wins: Add more detailed content about services, especially focusing on unique selling propositions and customer benefits.
Implement a review generation strategy to build up Google reviews and improve local SEO.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords related to HVAC services in Chicago.

gbp_analysis.summary: The website mentions serving the Chicago area but lacks detailed location-based content and geo-specific optimizations. The absence of Google Business Profile (GBP) further limits local search visibility.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile (GBP) found, which is crucial for local search visibility.
Lack of location-specific landing pages or content for different cities served.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or minimal NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web. This limits local search authority and trust.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
Audit and update NAP citations across major directories and local listing sites.
Ensure consistency in NAP format across all online platforms.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema is missing detailed information such as opening hours, service area, and specific service types.
Review schema is not implemented to showcase customer testimonials and ratings.
FAQPage schema could be added to address common customer queries and improve search visibility.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of content depth and user engagement features
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed HVAC solutions and customer experiences
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing review schema and adding customer testimonials
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative blog content about HVAC trends, energy efficiency, and local climate considerations

page_title: HVAC Contractors | Going Green Home Solutions
